fields.label: Brand
fields.tooltip_md: Manufacturer brand name

fields.label: Model
fields.tooltip_md: Full model name/number

fields.label: Base Model
fields.tooltip_md: Base model without variant suffix

fields.label: Variant
fields.tooltip_md: Variant identifier (size, region, revision)

fields.label: SKU
fields.tooltip_md: Manufacturer SKU or part number

fields.label: MPN
fields.tooltip_md: Manufacturer Part Number

fields.label: GTIN / UPC
fields.tooltip_md: Global Trade Item Number / UPC barcode

fields.label: Category
fields.tooltip_md: Product category

fields.label: Screen Size
fields.tooltip_md: Diagonal screen size in inches (e.g. 27, 31.5, 34)

fields.label: Panel Type
fields.tooltip_md: Panel technology: IPS, VA, TN, OLED, QD-OLED, W-OLED, Mini-LED IPS, etc.

fields.label: Resolution
fields.tooltip_md: Native resolution as WxH (e.g. 2560 x 1440, 3840 x 2160)

fields.label: Aspect Ratio
fields.tooltip_md: Display aspect ratio (e.g. 16:9, 21:9, 32:9, 16:10)

fields.label: Pixel Density
fields.tooltip_md: Pixels per inch

fields.label: Subpixel Layout
fields.tooltip_md: Subpixel arrangement: RGB, BGR, WRGB, RWBG

fields.label: Panel Bit Depth
fields.tooltip_md: Native panel bit depth: 6-bit, 8-bit, 10-bit

fields.label: FRC (Dithering)
fields.tooltip_md: Frame Rate Control dithering to simulate higher bit depth

fields.label: Curved
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the display is curved

fields.label: Curve Radius
fields.tooltip_md: Curvature radius in R (e.g. 1000R, 1500R, 1800R)

fields.label: Panel Coating
fields.tooltip_md: Panel surface coating: matte, glossy, semi-glossy, anti-glare

fields.label: Panel Manufacturer
fields.tooltip_md: Panel manufacturer (LG Display, AU Optronics, BOE, Samsung Display, Innolux)

fields.label: Native Colors
fields.tooltip_md: Number of displayable colors in millions (e.g. 16.7M, 1.07B)

fields.label: Refresh Rate
fields.tooltip_md: Maximum native refresh rate in Hz

fields.label: Max Refresh Rate (DisplayPort)
fields.tooltip_md: Maximum refresh rate achievable over DisplayPort.

fields.label: Max Refresh Rate (HDMI)
fields.tooltip_md: Maximum refresh rate achievable over HDMI.

fields.label: Response Time (GtG)
fields.tooltip_md: Gray-to-gray response time in ms (manufacturer-stated)

fields.label: Response Time (MPRT)
fields.tooltip_md: Moving Picture Response Time in ms (measured motion clarity)

fields.label: Response Time (120 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured average response time when the display runs at 120 Hz.

fields.label: Response Time (60 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured average response time when the display runs at 60 Hz.

fields.label: Overshoot (Max Refresh)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at the monitor's maximum refresh rate.

fields.label: Overshoot (120 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at 120 Hz.

fields.label: Overshoot (60 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured overshoot or inverse ghosting at 60 Hz.

fields.label: Input Lag
fields.tooltip_md: Total input lag in ms (measured end-to-end signal delay)

fields.label: Input Lag (Max Refresh)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at the monitor's maximum supported refresh rate.

fields.label: Input Lag (120 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at 120 Hz.

fields.label: Input Lag (60 Hz)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured input lag at 60 Hz.

fields.label: Adaptive Sync
fields.tooltip_md: Adaptive sync technology: FreeSync, FreeSync Premium, FreeSync Premium Pro, G-Sync, G-Sync Compatible, G-Sync Ultimate

fields.label: VRR Range
fields.tooltip_md: Variable refresh rate range in Hz (e.g. 48-165 Hz)

fields.label: Variable Refresh Rate
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor supports variable refresh rate

fields.label: Overdrive
fields.tooltip_md: Whether overdrive/response time boost is available

fields.label: Motion Blur Reduction
fields.tooltip_md: Backlight strobing for motion clarity (ELMB, DyAc, ULMB, BFI)

fields.label: Brightness (SDR)
fields.tooltip_md: Typical SDR peak brightness in nits (cd/m²)

fields.label: Peak HDR Brightness
fields.tooltip_md: Peak HDR brightness in nits (measured)

fields.label: Contrast Ratio
fields.tooltip_md: Static contrast ratio (e.g. 1000:1, 3000:1, Infinite for OLED)

fields.label: Dynamic Contrast Ratio
fields.tooltip_md: Dynamic contrast ratio (marketing spec, not measured)

fields.label: sRGB Coverage
fields.tooltip_md: sRGB color gamut coverage percentage

fields.label: DCI-P3 Coverage
fields.tooltip_md: DCI-P3 color gamut coverage percentage

fields.label: Adobe RGB Coverage
fields.tooltip_md: Adobe RGB color gamut coverage percentage

fields.label: Color Accuracy (ΔE)
fields.tooltip_md: Average color error measured as Delta E (lower is better)

fields.label: HDR Support
fields.tooltip_md: HDR standards supported: HDR10, HDR10+, Dolby Vision, DisplayHDR 400/600/1000/1400

fields.label: Factory Calibrated
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor ships factory-calibrated with dE < 2

fields.label: Backlight Type
fields.tooltip_md: Backlight technology: WLED edge-lit, WLED direct-lit, Mini-LED, none (OLED)

fields.label: Local Dimming Zones
fields.tooltip_md: Number of local dimming zones (for FALD / Mini-LED backlight)

fields.label: Wide Color Gamut
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor supports wide color gamut (typically >90% DCI-P3)

fields.label: Reflections
fields.tooltip_md: Measured total reflections as a percentage of incident light.

fields.label: Horizontal Viewing Angle
fields.tooltip_md: Measured horizontal viewing angle before notable color or luminance shift.

fields.label: Vertical Viewing Angle
fields.tooltip_md: Measured vertical viewing angle before notable color or luminance shift.

fields.label: Gray Uniformity (50%)
fields.tooltip_md: Measured gray uniformity around a 50% gray window.

fields.label: Black Uniformity
fields.tooltip_md: Measured black uniformity or luminance deviation across the screen.

fields.label: Text Clarity
fields.tooltip_md: Overall text clarity assessment for desktop use.

fields.label: Gradient Handling
fields.tooltip_md: Assessment of the panel's ability to render smooth gradients without banding.

fields.label: HDMI Ports
fields.tooltip_md: HDMI port count and version (e.g. 2x HDMI 2.1)

fields.label: HDMI Version
fields.tooltip_md: Highest supported HDMI specification revision (for example HDMI 2.0 or HDMI 2.1a).

fields.label: DisplayPort
fields.tooltip_md: DisplayPort count and version (e.g. 1x DP 1.4, 1x DP 2.1)

fields.label: DisplayPort Version
fields.tooltip_md: Highest supported DisplayPort specification revision (for example DisplayPort 1.4a or 2.1).

fields.label: Display Stream Compression
fields.tooltip_md: Display Stream Compression support or stated DSC revision.

fields.label: Thunderbolt Ports
fields.tooltip_md: Thunderbolt port count exposed by the monitor.

fields.label: Thunderbolt Version
fields.tooltip_md: Supported Thunderbolt generation (for example Thunderbolt 3, 4, or 5).

fields.label: USB-C Ports
fields.tooltip_md: USB-C port count, alt mode, and power delivery wattage

fields.label: USB Hub
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in USB hub port count and version (e.g. 4x USB 3.0)

fields.label: Ethernet / RJ45
fields.tooltip_md: Integrated Ethernet uplink capability and stated LAN speed.

fields.label: Headphone Jack
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor has a 3.5mm headphone output

fields.label: Audio Output
fields.tooltip_md: Audio output type (3.5mm, SPDIF, optical)

fields.label: KVM Switch
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in KVM switch for multi-computer control

fields.label: Daisy Chain (DP Out)
fields.tooltip_md: DisplayPort output for daisy-chaining multiple monitors

fields.label: Weight (Without Stand)
fields.tooltip_md: Weight without stand in grams

fields.label: Weight (With Stand)
fields.tooltip_md: Weight with stand in grams

fields.label: Width
fields.tooltip_md: Width of the monitor without stand in mm

fields.label: Height
fields.tooltip_md: Height of the monitor without stand in mm

fields.label: Depth
fields.tooltip_md: Depth/thickness of the monitor without stand in mm

fields.label: Height (With Stand)
fields.tooltip_md: Total height with stand at lowest position in mm

fields.label: VESA Mount
fields.tooltip_md: VESA mount pattern (e.g. 100x100, 200x200, 75x75, None)

fields.label: Height Adjustment
fields.tooltip_md: Height adjustment range in mm (e.g. 130mm, 0-150mm)

fields.label: Tilt Range
fields.tooltip_md: Tilt adjustment range (e.g. -5° to 20°)

fields.label: Swivel Range
fields.tooltip_md: Swivel adjustment range (e.g. -45° to 45°)

fields.label: Pivot / Portrait
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the stand supports 90° pivot rotation for portrait mode

fields.label: Wall Mountable
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the monitor is wall-mountable

fields.label: Speakers
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in speakers (e.g. 2x 2W, 2x 5W, None)

fields.label: Webcam
fields.tooltip_md: Integrated webcam capability or headline resolution.

fields.label: Microphone
fields.tooltip_md: Integrated microphone presence or array type.

fields.label: PiP / PbP
fields.tooltip_md: Picture-in-Picture / Picture-by-Picture multi-source display

fields.label: Flicker-Free
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the backlight is flicker-free (DC dimming)

fields.label: Flicker Frequency
fields.tooltip_md: Measured pulse-width modulation or image flicker frequency.

fields.label: Low Blue Light
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in blue light reduction / eye care mode

fields.label: Crosshair Overlay
fields.tooltip_md: Built-in on-screen crosshair/aim-point overlay for gaming

fields.label: USB-C Power Delivery
fields.tooltip_md: USB-C Power Delivery wattage for laptop charging

fields.label: Cables Included
fields.tooltip_md: Cables and accessories included in the box

fields.label: OSD Control
fields.tooltip_md: OSD control method: buttons, joystick, touch-sensitive, remote

fields.label: PS5 Compatibility
fields.tooltip_md: Compatibility status with PlayStation 5, including common console display modes.

fields.label: Xbox Series X|S Compatibility
fields.tooltip_md: Compatibility status with Xbox Series X and Series S display modes.

fields.label: macOS Compatibility
fields.tooltip_md: Practical compatibility status with macOS systems and common Apple workflows.

fields.label: Power Consumption (Typical)
fields.tooltip_md: Typical power consumption in watts

fields.label: Power Consumption (Max)
fields.tooltip_md: Maximum power consumption in watts

fields.label: Energy Rating
fields.tooltip_md: Energy efficiency rating or Energy Star certification

fields.label: Release Date
fields.tooltip_md: Product release/launch date

fields.label: Price (MSRP)
fields.tooltip_md: MSRP / launch retail price in USD

fields.label: Discontinued
fields.tooltip_md: Whether the product is discontinued

fields.label: Color
fields.tooltip_md: Available chassis/body color options

fields.label: Warranty
fields.tooltip_md: Manufacturer warranty period

fields.label: Cable Length
fields.tooltip_md: Included cable length in mm

fields.label: Cable Type
fields.tooltip_md: Type of included cables

fields.label: Material
fields.tooltip_md: Chassis/body material

fields.label: Colors
fields.tooltip_md: EG-compatible colorway tokens. Lowercase + hyphens only. Multi-color variants use "+" (e.g. black+red). Must match canonical EG palette. Normalize grey→gray.

fields.label: Editions
fields.tooltip_md: EG-compatible edition slugs. Kebab-case only (lowercase, hyphens, no spaces). Examples: cyberpunk-2077-edition, sf6-chun-li, wilderness.
